hero.description: Platform for food safety standards, management systems, laboratory research and educational materials.

modules.title: Portal Sections
modules.subtitle: Choose the direction you need for working with food product expertise

systems.title: Management Systems
systems.description: HACCP, ISO 22000, FSSC 22000, BRCGS, IFS and other safety systems.

standards.title: Standards
standards.description: Regulatory documents, DSTU, technical regulations and legislation.

laboratory.description: Methods of microbiological, chemical and physico-chemical research.

education.title: Education
education.description: Educational materials, courses and cases for students and specialists.

glossary.title: Glossary
glossary.description: Interpretation of terms and definitions in the field of food safety.

search.title: Search
search.description: Global search across all materials and documents of the portal.
